sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32884" key="e)kskorpismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκσκορπισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n32884.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scattering abroad,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.383d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
